Lens Replacement

Extend the lifespan of spectacles that you cherish with regular lens replacement

Basic Charge

Eyesight
Measurement

Lens
Processing

Lens

Frame
Cleaning

S$98

S$98

Let us help you extend the lifespan of spectacles that you cherish by replacing the lenses. Simply bring the spectacles that you can no longer use due to changes in your prescription or damage to the lenses to any OWNDAYS store near you. We are happy to replace the lenses of spectacles purchased from other shops too.

  • Price includes eye test, frame fitting, lens processing and frame cleaning.
  • Service may not be available for some spectacles due to constraints in frame condition and shape.

Click here for Lenses details

Lens Replacement Steps

  • STEP1Bring your glasses to the nearest OWNDAYS shop

    Bring your glasses to any OWNDAYS shop. The staff would first assess the condition of your glasses and recommend you the most suitable solution, which may include replacing the frame, cleaning the lenses, or adjusting the fitting.

  • STEP2Select Types of Lenses

    OWNDAYS offers a complimentary eye test. Besides the standard lenses, you can choose to upgrade to PC lenses, color lenses, or other option lenses.

    • Processing time of 7 working days is required for option lenses and lenses of certain prescriptions.
    • Not available in online store.

  • STEP3Collection

    You can collect your glasses in as little as 20 minutes after payment is made. You will also enjoy a 1-year warranty on lens visual performance under the OWNDAYS Customer Guarantees programme.

    Click here for Customer Guarantees

Lens Replacement Q&A

  • Can you replace the lenses of the glasses from another shop?

    open

    Yes, we can replace them. However, we are unable to do replacement for some glasses due to the shape and parts as well as the condition of the frame. Please let our staff see the frame first.

  • Can you make lenses with the same prescription as the ones I’m currently using?

    open

    Yes, we can. Please bring your glasses or any record stating your strength to any of our shops.

  • What kind of lenses do you use?

    open

    All OWNDAYS lenses are produced by major Japanese manufacturers and have UV protection and anti-reflective coating.

  • Can you replace the lenses of rimless frames?

    open

    Yes, we can.However, as a rimless frame requires precision edging, it might take a few days to be processed.

  • How long does it take to complete my glasses?

    open

    Your glasses can be ready in as little as 20 minutes when we have the lenses in stock at the shop. For some lenses such as color lenses and progressive lenses, it takes about 2 weeks since they're custom-made.

  • I don't think there is any charge for special processing for rimless frames?

    open

    If special processing is required (such as for rimless frames), an additional cost may apply.
